About Me

Meet Vivek.

I'm a passionate video editor and motion designer currently pursuing Computer Science Engineering at Ramgarh Engineering College.

I help creators, brands, and businesses transform raw footage into engaging content through storytelling, motion graphics, sound design, and professional editing.

My goal is simple: Create videos that people actually want to watch.
